Off Calendar Dec-11-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise/ Compromise of Incompetent Person hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Appearances:
Alexander J. Perez, , Esq. for Petitioner: Sushil Ladhar present as guardian ad litem for Justin Ladhar, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Total Allowance for fees and expenses: $15,278.26 (see attachment 6a(4))
A net balance of $2,221.71 of the settlement proceeds shall be disbursed to the Petitioner, Sushil Ladhar to be held in trust for the benefit of the Minor until reaches age 18.
Order signed in court.
